message:
feat: flip frankenterm-gui codec dep from async-smol to async-asupersync

Continues workspace-wide async runtime unification. The GUI crate has
no direct smol/async-io usage — this is purely the codec dependency
feature flag.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,7 @@ anyhow.workspace = true
 frankenterm-core.workspace = true
 
 # Vendored FrankenTerm crates (ex-WezTerm)
-codec = { workspace = true, features = ["async-smol"] }
+codec = { workspace = true, features = ["async-asupersync"] }
 config.workspace = true
 filedescriptor.workspace = true
 frecency.workspace = true
